Projects

This is an incomplete list of projects I worked on:

  • Neural Network implementation for MNIST digit classification without any ML libraries
  • Simple fluid simulation using Finite Differences Method in C++
  • A small 2D robot localization game using Kalman filtering written in C++11
  • All my code for the project euler problems
  • A particle based 3D fluid simulation project in FORTRAN 90
  • A lightweight workout timer app for workouts of all kind

© Jannik Zürn 2020
